fitness-reality-810xlt.name: Fitness Reality 810XLT Super Max Power Cage
cons: 14-gauge steel is thinner than premium racks
Plastic J-cup liners can wear over time
Not ideal for lifters squatting 600+ lbs

rogue-monster-lite-r3.name: Rogue RML-390F Monster Lite Rack
pros: Made in Columbus, Ohio — American steel
3x3" 11-gauge uprights — overbuilt for any home gym
Westside hole spacing in the bench zone
Massive Monster Lite attachment ecosystem (50+ accessories)
No floor bolting required (flat foot design)
cons: Premium price point at $935
Heavy shipping costs (freight delivery)
Accessories sold separately at premium prices

rep-pr-4000.name: REP Fitness PR-4000 Power Rack
pros: Fully customizable — choose height, depth, color
Growing attachment ecosystem with unique options
cons: Frequently sells out due to demand
Base price doesn't include many attachments
Shipping can be slow during peak demand

titan-t3.name: Titan Fitness T-3 Series Power Rack
pros: 1,100 lb weight capacity at a mid-range price
Compatible with Rogue Monster Lite attachments
Westside hole spacing in bench zone
cons: Powder coat finish can vary between batches
Customer service response times can be slow
Some hardware may need retightening after a month

bowflex-selecttech-552.name: Bowflex SelectTech 552 Adjustable Dumbbells

specs.footprint: 16.9" L x 8.3" W x 9" H each

pros: Fastest weight change system on the market (2 seconds)
2.5 lb increments up to 25 lbs for precise progression
cons: Cannot be dropped — internal mechanism is fragile
Length at 52.5 lbs feels awkward on some exercises
Price has increased from original $349 MSRP
5 lb increments above 25 lbs (no 2.5 lb jumps)

cap-barbell-olympic.name: CAP Barbell 300 lb Olympic Weight Set

specs.weightCapacity: 300 lbs total (255 lbs plates + 45 lb bar)

pros: Complete barbell + plate set in one purchase
Standard Olympic 2" sleeves fit all racks
Cast iron plates are durable and accurate
Best value starter weight set available
cons: Bar is entry-level (bushing sleeves, mild knurling)
Plates are not calibrated for competition use
No bumper plates — not safe to drop on concrete
Chrome plating on bar chips over time

rogue-echo-bike.name: Rogue Echo Bike V3.0
pros: Belt-driven steel fan — smoother and quieter than chain
Built like a tank at 123 lbs — zero wobble
Great for HIIT, steady-state, and warm-ups
cons: Heavy at 123 lbs — difficult to move
Gets exponentially harder at high RPMs
No programmable workout modes on console
Premium price at $945

flybird-adjustable-bench.name: FLYBIRD Adjustable Weight Bench
pros: Folds flat for easy storage in small spaces
cons: Gap between seat and backrest at steep inclines
No decline position on some variants
Pad is narrower (10.2") than premium benches (12")
Feet can slide on smooth concrete without rubber mats
